string 2: Yes, this is Shiroki.

A strange light in a back alley of the shopping district? 
Understood. We'll investigate immediately.

What's the big deal with those people? Why all the fuss
over some vehicle in the square?

What's up with that vehicle and those people? Never seen
them before... A crowd is gatherin' around to gawk.

The target's in the underground... Everyone, take up
positions.
Sir! Yes, sir!
Say, that man just now...
Perhaps we should keep an eye on him.

Yeah... He said, "This organization never changes!" didn't
he?
Could he know about the Anomalous Affairs Division...?

Where in the world did those kids run off to? I just hope
they're okay...
This area is currently off-limits. Turn back immediately.

Let's see... We still haven't looked that way, so let's
check it out.

The Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building sure is huge!
Just look how tall it is!

Huh? What do you mean, "Is it still standing?" If a building
that big collapsed, it'd be mayhem around here.

Law and order's alive and well here in Japan, you know! A
lot of weird stuff's been happening lately, but still...
I remember you guys from before. What're you doing here?
{next}We're looking for Dr. Simmons.
Nothing, really.{end}
Dr. Simmons?
Then you'd better clear out.
You won't find her here.

Hmph. Trolling for parts over in Akihabara at a time like
this... Who knows what's going through that lady's head?
Akihabara?
Whoops. I've said too much...

Go on, now. Get out of here! This area will be closed off
again any minute now, too.
Hm? Say, didn't I see you at the Kabukicho theater square?
Um, we don't want to disturb your work... Excuse us!

You sure? I bet I could squeeze a little more information
out of him... That noggin of his looks real squeezable...
Nobody's squeezing anything! Come on. Let's go, already!
We've been filled in. Please go on inside.

A scientist working for public safety, huh. If she's
accomplished, there must be some public info on her.

I'll see what I can find out about her. You'll hear from me
as soon as I learn anything, so sit tight.
Perhaps we should talk to that man.

I need to have a little talk with this person. I leave the
half-pint to you.
Ah, you're back! Great work out there.

All of the Digimon around Shinjuku have been successfully
eliminated.

The route to the Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building's
secure. We can head to Nishi-Shinjuku from there.
And... take a look at this!

Here's a miniaturized version of an electromagnetic net
generator. This bad boy may be small, but it packs a punch.
Hee hee hee. Amazing! Wouldn't you agree? I sure think so.

But it can only be used once before the battery is drained,
so even I haven't had a chance to see it in action yet.

You folks ought to be the ones to give it a test drive. It might
come in handy.

Hee hee hee. Well, now... We're going to have our hands
full from here on out.

The route behind the park to the government building has
been secured. Take this device and head in that direction.

Don't you have somewhere to be? You should be prioritizing
the task at hand.

Good work. The calibration is complete, and we can
now detect your coordinates with great precision.

You've noticed that people are talking about anomalous phenomena, right?
I've been going through posts on the internet from eight years ago again.

It seems the rumors of anomalies in the Shinjuku area
started around the time you're in right now. Coincidence?

One post mentions "a strange light in a back alley in
Kabukicho, Shinjuku." Might be some kind of anomaly.

So that's your next mission. Head to this back alley
in Shinjuku's Kabukicho.

I heard about you folks from my colleagues. Thanks for the
help.

We've recorded very good data, but it's still not enough. I
should talk to the doctor.
If you don't mind, would you care to join me for a card battle?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
That's too bad. Maybe I'll just go kill time at a local cafe...

Oh, wow. I didn't expect to lose. This game really does have
surprising depth.
I did it! I won! Looks like today is going to be a great day!
What's with this box...? I don't think it was there yesterday.

I'm going to ask this person a few more questions. Could you
go see if you can find any other clues?
Coo is looking around, too. Let's see what we can find.

Wait...! Will you just listen to me for a second?
I'm begging you, here!
It's locked.
I bet we could break it down with the help of a Digimon.
How strange. They told me they'd be playing around here...
{next}Can I help you?
{next}Are you the mother of those kids from yesterday?
{next}I'm not suspicious. I promise.

I came here to get them, but I can't find them anywhere... Wait.
Could you be the one who played with them yesterday?

What? Oh. Yes... Wait. Could you be the one who played with
them yesterday?

Wh-What's this about? Saying that in an outfit as conspicuous
as yours isn't exactly convincing...
Wait. Could you be the one who played with them yesterday?
Yeah, that's me.
See?! {player}! Inori! Everyone remembered the promise!
Are you... looking for your kids, maybe?
Yes, they were so insistent that I let them go play early today.

But now it's time for their after-school lessons... Where
could those kids be? I doubt they've gone very far...

Look. Small footprints. It might be from those kids. They
must have been playing around here!
There might be other clues around here. Let's keep looking!
More footprints here... They lead that way!

Footprints...? Now that you mention it, I think I can just
barely make them out, too. You've got a good eye, Aegiomon.
Again, more footprints?
It seems that Aegiomon found something interesting over there...
Doesn't look like those kids are here anywhere...

We should hurry over to that manhole by the Tokyo Metropolitan
Government Building!
I don't see this door opening anytime soon...
...Whoa! Wh-What the heck?!
A-Are you the one who did that?! That's amazing!

The truth is, my daughter is stuck inside. I think she's gotten 
mixed up with the rumored anomalous phenomenon.

Would you be willing to come with me to help? I don't know
what I'd do if anything happened to my sweet girl!
Please...! I'm begging you...!
{next}Protecting civilians from anomalies is my job.
Anomalous phenomenon? Can you please explain that again?
Acting independently of the mission goes against protocol...
Thank you so much! I owe you!
All right, let's go find that rebellious child of mine!

Judging by the phone call I just got from her, it sounded
like she was caught up in some kind of trouble...

If I could have the strength you just showed me on my
side...! Please! Won't you come with me?!
I-I see. If that's how it is, that's how it is...
I'll go alone, if I have to.

Still... if there's any way you could see your way to coming
with me, you have no idea how grateful I'd be...
I'm going back to fight! It's a battle of revenge for Merukimon!

No good. You're surrounded by countless huge readings.
Find another route. Where'd these Digimon come from, anyway?

The world you time traveled to is decidedly full of more
hostile Digimon than the world I know.

Is time traveling the cause? Could the deviation from the
rules of time and space be bringing in new Digimon?

If the research team is correct, and their hostile nature is akin to antibodies
in an overreacting immune system, it would make sense, wouldn't it?

After all, a being that has traveled through time is nothing
more than a foreign substance to that world...!

When hostile Digimon gathered in the Shinjuku underground, 
I thought it was because of the egg that ended up there...

But what if the Digimon appeared there to get rid of the egg...
...like antibodies eliminating a foreign substance—a time traveler?

I don't have any evidence, but if I'm right, it would make sense 
that hostile Digimon increase with each time travel.
Are you curious as to why I have such a wild theory?

It's because ADAMAS once tried to eliminate Digimon with time
traveling abilities the exact same way—like a foreign substance.

There are numerous readings of hostile Digimon ahead. 
Find another route!

The Digimon District, used by public safety to contain Digimon... 
Large enemy presence detected ahead. Find another route!
